Bienvenue, Welcome, Wilkommen, Tere tulemast!

Posted on September 5, 2020

On this website, I am going to organize and collect all the projects I have worked on, associated also with my travels, stories from life in Estonia, Germany and France. I will build this website over the time and hopefully keep it fresh!
